title: SessionRecord
description: Metadata and summary of an important project session

session_id.description: Unique session identifier from the agent platform

agent_app.description: Agent app that ran this session (e.g. ChatGPT-Codex, Claude Code)

description.description: One-paragraph summary of what this session was about

key_decisions.description: List of important decisions made in this session

implemented.description: Features/changes actually implemented during this session

deferred.description: Items explicitly deferred to future sessions

raw_file_path.description: Local filesystem path to the raw session export file (JSONL or other format). NOT committed to git.

raw_file_format.description: Format of the raw session file

raw_file_lines.description: Number of lines in the raw file (for size reference)

commits_produced.description: Git commit SHAs produced in this session

open_issues.description: Issues or blockers still open at end of session
